description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 5th; Slot feet; Price 2,500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These soft boots are partially made out of living leaves and other natural materials. They enable the wearer to move nimbly about in virtually any surroundings, granting a +5 competence bonus on Acrobatics checks. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be an elf; Cost 1,250 gp.
